name: Projectile
description: Manages projectile spawning, physics, and collision detection. Fires projectiles in response to 'fire' events with configurable speed, gravity, spread, and damage. Uses object pooling for performance.
documentation:
## Projectile
Spawn and manage projectiles with physics and collision.

### Attributes
- **Speed** - Projectile velocity in units/second
- **Gravity** - Downward acceleration (0 for straight-line)
- **Lifetime** - Max seconds before auto-destroy
- **Spread** - Random deviation in radians
- **Damage** - Base damage on hit
- **Radius** - Collision detection radius

### Events
- **fire** - Launch a projectile. Data: `{ origin, direction, owner?, definitionId? }`

### Tips
- Set gravity > 0 for arcing projectiles (arrows, grenades)
- Use spread for shotgun-style weapons
- Combine with Combat Utils for damage calculation
author: stemstudio

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Projectile velocity in units per second.

gravity.name: Gravity
gravity.description: Downward acceleration applied each frame. Set to 0 for straight-line projectiles.

lifetime.name: Lifetime
lifetime.description: Maximum seconds a projectile exists before auto-destroying.

spread.name: Spread
spread.description: Random directional deviation in radians. Use for shotgun-style spread.

radius.name: Radius
radius.description: Collision detection radius of the projectile mesh.
